g.title: asset.copy_location_group:owner->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owner) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: asset.copy_location_group_map:lgroup->asset.copy_location_group:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (lgroup) REFERENCES asset.copy_location_group(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: rating.badge:loc_grp_filter->asset.copy_location_group:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (loc_grp_filter) REFERENCES asset.copy_location_group(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
